ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "ec_class_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the class of the component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_ec_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("ec_class_id") REFERENCES component_classes ("ec_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source component */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the relationship */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., physical, logical) */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength or importance of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_classes" (
  "ec_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ec_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_classes_parent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_class_id") REFERENCES component_classes ("ec_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, project manager, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_details" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_details_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
